entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 8:3
entries.excerpt: At the very gates she speaks, saying: O men, etc. She cries out to men, that is, to the vigorous hearers of the word in both sexes. For those who are of a womanish, i.e., weak mind, cannot grasp the words of wisdom.

entries.title: On Prov 8:3
entries.excerpt: "She4 is crying = = 44 at the gates, at the entry of the city, at the coming at the doors" (Prov. 8:3).
